The bank has one of the larger share repurchase programs in the country, and uses more than half its annual earnings for stock buybacks. news.title: Jamie Dimon Sells $40 Million of JPMorgan Stock
news.summary: JPMorgan Chief Executive Jamie Dimon sold more than $40 million of the bank’s stock on Wednesday in the latest cash out of his shares. Dimon, his wife and his family trusts hold the shares.

signals.summary: Comparative analysis article between Coca-Cola and Johnson & Johnson highlighting their Dividend King status, with JNJ showing accelerating pharmaceutical momentum and maintaining its 64-year dividend streak.

affected_positions.rationale: Positive mention of accelerating pharmaceutical momentum and dividend reliability reinforces defensive quality positioning.

signals.summary: FCC Chair approved Amazon's acquisition of Globalstar, supporting competition in satellite internet against SpaceX. This signals regulatory support for Amazon's Project Kuiper satellite ambitions.

affected_positions.rationale: Regulatory approval accelerates Amazon's satellite internet strategy, expanding TAM and creating new revenue streams in cloud connectivity and rural broadband.

source_event.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr Gives Nod To Amazon-Globalstar Deal As Satellite Internet Race With Elon Musk-Led SpaceX Intensifies: 'We're Very Open-Minded…'

signals.summary: ExxonMobil and partners plan to begin deepwater drilling offshore Greece by 2027, targeting new oil and gas reserves in a strategic expansion move.

affected_positions.rationale: New exploration project expands reserve base and signals growth optionality, though 2027 timeline limits near-term cash flow impact.

source_event.title: ExxonMobil & Partners Plan to Begin Deepwater Drilling Offshore Greece

signals.summary: Airline stocks rallied on oil price pullback and ceasefire news, but the sector remains vulnerable to headline risk and near-term volatility according to CNBC analysis.

affected_positions.rationale: Oil pullback creates modest near-term revenue headwind for the energy sector, though XOM's integrated model provides buffer.
Lower oil prices reduce logistics and transportation costs for e-commerce operations, marginally improving operating margins.

source_event.title: Airline stocks rebounded as oil pulled back. Why the rally may not last

signals.summary: Geopolitical crisis in the Strait of Hormuz and U.S.-Iran conflict driving extreme oil price volatility. Article suggests pivoting from integrated majors like Exxon to upstream/royalty plays amid supply disruption and blockade escalation.

affected_positions.rationale: Strait closure and Iranian infrastructure strikes create sustained supply shock favoring U.S. integrated oil majors with pricing power and refining margins.
Geopolitical escalation and potential naval blockade drive safe-haven and sanctions-evasion demand for non-sovereign digital assets.
Military conflict, energy supply disruption, and inflation from sustained $100+ crude trigger flight to traditional safe-haven assets.
Oil-driven inflation expectations and potential Fed hawkishness to combat energy-led price pressure threaten long-duration Treasuries.
Consumer discretionary faces margin compression from elevated energy/logistics costs and potential demand destruction from oil shock.
Sustained inflation from energy crisis increases probability of Fed maintaining higher-for-longer rates, pressuring rate-sensitive REITs.

source_event.title: Forget Exxon. The Smartest Oil Trade in 2026 Is the Company That Owns the Ground Beneath It
